status_quo: MRR reported $1.2M higher than billing-system actuals. Expansion revenue double-counted when CRM close dates diverge from subscription start dates, inflating board-reported growth by 8 points.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ reconciles CRM pipeline data against billing-system subscription records. The governed pipeline identified 4 revenue-recognition gaps across 2 reporting layers — giving finance a clear fix list before the next board deck.
